name: Mod Medusa
description: Four-output Euclidean LFO. Replaces triggers of an algo-rhythmic sequencer with full waveform cycles. Symmetry, shape, tables, correlated/independent modes, VCA, assignable gate.

controls.name: Length Potentiometer
controls.description: Sets sequence length 1-8 steps; Length+/Menu button extends to 9-16.

controls.name: Density Potentiometer
controls.description: Number of LFO cycles distributed across the pattern length. CCW mutes, CW fills.

controls.name: Shape Potentiometer
controls.description: Continuously morphs waveshape from sigmoid through exponential, logarithmic, linear, to sinusoidal.
controls.detail: Continuous · CV-addressable · paired with Symmetry for full wave design

controls.name: Symmetry Potentiometer
controls.description: Balances rise vs fall time of each cycle. Full CCW = ramp down, CW = ramp up, center = triangular/sine symmetric.

controls.name: Tap / Manual Gate Button
controls.description: Acts as tap tempo (green mode) or manual gate at the Assignable Gate input (red mode, set in menu).
controls.detail: Green = tap tempo · Red = manual A Gate

controls.name: Uni Button
controls.description: Toggles unipolar (0-5V) or bipolar (-5 to +5V). Correlated mode applies to all channels; independent mode per channel. Hold 2 s to store state to non-volatile memory.
controls.detail: Lit = unipolar · unlit = bipolar · hold 2 s = save state

controls.name: P Sync Button
controls.description: When ON, waves sync their peaks to the incoming clock rather than their starting points.
controls.detail: OFF = start-of-cycle sync · ON = peak sync

controls.name: Table / Division Button
controls.description: Selects one of 8 rhythmic tables. In menu: sets incoming clock divider 1-8.
controls.detail: Green LEDs: 1 Straight · 2 Classic Euclidean · 3 Revised Eucl · 4 Anti-Eucl · Amber: 5 Descelerando · 6 Accelerando · 7 Divided · 8 Fill Next

controls.name: Mode / A Gate Button
controls.description: Cycles Main / Compute / Random / Phase correlation modes. Hold 2 s to enter independent channel edit. In menu: configures Assignable Gate function.
controls.detail: MN · CP · RD · PH · hold 2 s = indep edit · A Gate: Ratchet x2/x3/x4/rand · Accel/Decel · T&H · One-Shot

controls.name: Shift +/- Buttons
controls.description: Rotates sequence forward/backward one step. Hold both 2 s = reset shift. In menu: assigns which channels the VCA input controls.

controls.name: Length+ / Menu Button
controls.description: Toggles 9-16 step extended range; hold 2 s to enter options menu (A Gate, VCA routing, clock divider).
controls.detail: Lit = 9-16 range · hold 2 s = options menu

inputs.name: Clock
inputs.description: External clock driving the Euclidean sequence engine.

inputs.name: VCA CV
inputs.description: Unipolar VCA CV; normalized to 5V. Assignable to any subset of the four outputs via menu.

inputs.name: Length CV
inputs.description: CV offset added to Length pot.

inputs.name: Symmetry CV
inputs.description: CV offset added to Symmetry pot.

inputs.name: Shape CV
inputs.description: CV offset added to Shape pot.

inputs.name: Density CV
inputs.description: CV offset added to Density pot.

inputs.name: Reset
inputs.description: Resets the wave sequence to step 1.

inputs.name: Assignable Gate
inputs.description: Gate input performing the menu-selected function: Ratchet (x2/x3/x4/Random), Accelerando, Decelerando, Track & Hold, One-Shot.

outputs.name: Out 1
outputs.description: Primary LFO output carrying the panel-set waveform.

outputs.name: Out 2
outputs.description: Correlated or independent LFO channel 2. Correlated relationship defined by mode (Main=Backward, Compute=L/2 & C/2, Random=Soft Fill, Phase=L/4 shift).

outputs.name: Out 3
outputs.description: Correlated or independent LFO channel 3. Correlated: Main=Inverted, Compute=2xL/3 & 2xC/3, Random=Hard Fill, Phase=L/2 shift.

outputs.name: Out 4
outputs.description: Correlated or independent LFO channel 4. Correlated: Main=1 cycle per length, Compute=L-C, Random=full random, Phase=3L/4 shift.

behaviors.name: Euclidean LFO Engine
behaviors.description: Each cycle of the LFO maps to a hit in an algorithmic sequence (Euclidean, Anti-Euclidean, Split, Divider etc.). Cycle timing adapts to the gap between consecutive hits.

behaviors.name: Correlated Modes
behaviors.description: Channels 2-4 derive from channel 1: MN (Main: backward/inverted/1-per-length), CP (Compute math), RD (Random fills), PH (Phase: L/4, L/2, 3L/4 shifts for quadrature-like feel).

behaviors.name: Independent Mode
behaviors.description: Panel controls address one channel at a time. Each of four channels holds its own length, density, shift, shape, symmetry, table, polarity, peak sync. CV inputs remain bound to channel 1.

behaviors.name: Peak Sync
behaviors.description: When ON, wave peaks align with the clock instead of wave starts. Converts sequence feel from attack-on-beat to peak-on-beat — changes perceived rhythmic character dramatically.

behaviors.name: Assignable Gate Functions
behaviors.description: Gate performs ratcheting (x2/x3/x4/random), accelerando/decelerando cycle-rate modulation, Track & Hold (freeze outputs when gate low), or One-Shot gating.

behaviors.name: VCA Routing
behaviors.description: Unipolar VCA controls amplitude of any subset of the four outputs selected via menu. Enables a single envelope to shape only the outputs that need shaping.

behaviors.name: Clock Divider
behaviors.description: Divides incoming clock 1-8 before the Euclidean engine. Useful when feeding a fast master clock but wanting slow modulation periods.

patchIdeas.name: Quad correlated modulation
patchIdeas.patch: Clock into CLK · Main mode · four outputs modulate VCF cutoff, VCA level, FX send, pan · peak sync ON for beat-aligned swells
patchIdeas.diagram:
MOD MEDUSA:
* Mode: MN · P Sync: ON · Uni: bipolar
- Clock (Out) c> Mod Medusa (Clock)
- Mod Medusa (Out 1) >> VCF (Cutoff)
- Mod Medusa (Out 2) >> VCA (CV) // backward
- Mod Medusa (Out 3) >> FX Send (Level) // inverted
- Mod Medusa (Out 4) >> Pan (CV) // 1 per length

patchIdeas.name: Quadrature-phase filter sweep
patchIdeas.patch: Phase mode · stereo filter cutoff L/R from Out 1 and Out 3 (L/2 shift) · Out 2 at L/4 feeds reverb size · Out 4 at 3L/4 feeds pan
patchIdeas.diagram:
MOD MEDUSA:
* Mode: PH · L=8
- Clock (Out) c> Mod Medusa (Clock)
- Mod Medusa (Out 1) >> VCF (Cutoff L)
- Mod Medusa (Out 3) >> VCF (Cutoff R) // L/2 shift
- Mod Medusa (Out 2) >> Reverb (Size) // L/4 shift
- Mod Medusa (Out 4) >> Pan (CV) // 3L/4 shift

patchIdeas.name: Track & Hold stepped LFO
patchIdeas.patch: A Gate menu = Track & Hold · gate from sequencer · outputs freeze to stepped values between gates · great for melodic CV if fed to quantizer
patchIdeas.diagram:
MOD MEDUSA:
* A Gate: T&H
- Clock (Out) c> Mod Medusa (Clock)
- Sequencer (Gate) g> Mod Medusa (A Gate)
- Mod Medusa (Out 1) >> Quantizer (CV)
- Quantizer (Out) p> VCO (V/Oct)
- Mod Medusa (Out 2) >> VCF (Cutoff)

patchIdeas.name: Accelerando ratchet fill
patchIdeas.patch: A Gate menu = Accelerando · gate at bar-3 of a 4-bar loop sweeps cycle rate upward for a drum-roll build · normal Euclidean patterns resume after gate release
patchIdeas.diagram:
MOD MEDUSA:
* A Gate: Accelerando
- Clock (Out) c> Mod Medusa (Clock)
- Bar 3 Gate (Out) g> Mod Medusa (A Gate)
- Mod Medusa (Out 1) >> Drum Synth (Pitch)
- Mod Medusa (Out 2) t> Drum Envelope (Trig) // via cycle starts

patchIdeas.name: Compute polyrhythm modulation
patchIdeas.patch: Compute mode · Out 1 (L=12, density 4) · Out 2 (L=6, density 2) · Out 3 (L=8, density 2 via 2xL/3) · Out 4 (L=8, density 3 via L-C) · four nested polyrhythms from one clock
patchIdeas.diagram:
MOD MEDUSA:
* Mode: CP · L=12 D=4
- Clock (Out) c> Mod Medusa (Clock)
- Mod Medusa (Out 1) >> VCO 1 (FM)
- Mod Medusa (Out 2) >> VCO 2 (FM)
- Mod Medusa (Out 3) >> Filter 1 (Cutoff)
- Mod Medusa (Out 4) >> Filter 2 (Cutoff)

patchIdeas.name: Shape + Symmetry live morph
patchIdeas.patch: Two LFOs modulate Shape and Symmetry CVs respectively · output mutates from pulse-like exp to smooth sine to sawtooth without changing rhythm · single slow sweep sounds like three different modulations
patchIdeas.diagram:
MOD MEDUSA:
- Clock (Out) c> Mod Medusa (Clock)
- Slow LFO 1 (Out) >> Mod Medusa (Shape CV)
- Slow LFO 2 (Out) >> Mod Medusa (Symmetry CV)
- Mod Medusa (Out 1) >> VCF (Cutoff)
- Mod Medusa (Out 2) >> Wavefolder (Amount)

patchIdeas.name: Independent per-voice modulation
patchIdeas.patch: Hold Mode 2 s · edit each channel with different length/table/polarity · Out 1 slow sine for pad filter · Out 2 fast ramp for lead volume · Out 3 random for perc pitch · Out 4 anti-euclidean for FX
patchIdeas.diagram:
MOD MEDUSA:
* Independent mode · 4 channels unique
- Clock (Out) c> Mod Medusa (Clock)
- Mod Medusa (Out 1) >> Pad VCF (Cutoff) // slow sine
- Mod Medusa (Out 2) >> Lead VCA (CV) // fast ramp
- Mod Medusa (Out 3) >> Perc VCO (FM) // random
- Mod Medusa (Out 4) >> Delay (Feedback) // anti-eucl

patchIdeas.name: VCA-gated envelope substitute
patchIdeas.patch: Menu assigns VCA to Out 2 only · sequencer envelope into VCA CV · Out 1 provides free-running filter mod · Out 2 replaces a dedicated envelope for a voice
patchIdeas.diagram:
MOD MEDUSA:
* Menu: VCA → Out 2
- Clock (Out) c> Mod Medusa (Clock)
- Envelope (Out) >> Mod Medusa (VCA CV)
- Mod Medusa (Out 1) >> VCF (Cutoff) // free
- Mod Medusa (Out 2) >> VCA (CV) // VCA-gated
- Audio (Out) -> VCA (In)
- VCA (Out) -> Output (L)
